templates.title: Recursive directory walker
Duplicate file finder
Directory size calculator
Advanced glob with regex fallback
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(root, pattern="*", regex=None):
    """Return list paths matching glob, optional regex filter."""
    import glob, os, re
    paths = glob.glob(os.path.join(root, "**", pattern), recursive=True)
    if regex:
        rx = re.compile(regex)
        paths = [p for p in paths if rx.search(p)]
    return paths

templates.title: Path sanitizer — bersihkan karakter ilegal
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(path):
    """Sanitize path, cegah traversal."""
    import os, re
    path = os.path.normpath(path)
    path = re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9._\-/\\]', '_', path)
    parts = []
    for part in path.replace('\\', '/').split('/'):
        if part in ('', '.', '..'):
            continue
        parts.append(part)
    return os.path.join(*parts) if parts else '.'

templates.title: File splitter — pecah file besar per chunk
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(src_path, chunk_size={{chunk_size}}):
    """Split file, return list chunk paths."""
    import os
    chunks = []
    with open(src_path, 'rb') as f:
        idx = 0
        while True:
            data = f.read(chunk_size)
            if not data:
                break
            chunk_path = f"{src_path}.part{idx:03d}"
            with open(chunk_path, 'wb') as out:
                out.write(data)
            chunks.append(chunk_path)
            idx += 1
    return chunks

templates.title: File merger — gabung chunks jadi satu
File-based lock — mutual exclusion
Tail — baca N baris terakhir file
templates.description: Seperti Unix `tail`, tanpa baca seluruh file
templates.code:
def {{nama_fungsi}}(path, n={{n_lines}}, encoding='utf-8'):
    """Return n baris terakhir."""
    with open(path, 'rb') as f:
        f.seek(0, 2)
        size = f.tell()
        block = 1024
        data = b''
        while len(data.splitlines()) <= n and f.tell() > 0:
            step = min(block, f.tell())
            f.seek(-step, 1)
            data = f.read(step) + data
            f.seek(-step, 1)
            if f.tell() == 0:
                break
        lines = data.decode(encoding, errors='replace').splitlines()
        return lines[-n:]
